ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the size chart belongs to */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the garment (e.g., 4, 5, 6) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height range for the size (e.g., 36-40, 40-44) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight range for the size (e.g., 30-40, 35-45) */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck size range for the size (e.g., 10-10.5, 10.5-11) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest size range for the size (e.g., 22-24, 23-25) */,
  "sleeve" TEXT /* Sleeve length range for the size (e.g., 19-20, 20-21) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist size range for the size (e.g., 24-26, 26-28) */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip size range for the size (e.g., 34-36, 36-38) */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam length range for the size (e.g., 28-30, 30-32) */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder width range for the size (e.g., 14-15, 15-16) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product size is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the profile belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer (e.g., 36-40, 40-44) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the customer (e.g., 30-40, 35-45) */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck size of the customer (e.g., 10-10.5, 10.5-11) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest size of the customer (e.g., 22-24, 23-25) */,
  "sleeve" TEXT /* Sleeve length of the customer (e.g., 19-20, 20-21) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist size of the customer (e.g., 24-26, 26-28) */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip size of the customer (e.g., 34-36, 36-38) */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam length of the customer (e.g., 28-30, 30-32) */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder width of the customer (e.g., 14-15, 15-16) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price_at_purchase" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
